memoryArtifacts.headline: Arms of the city of Saumur (Maine-et-Loire), registered in 1699.
Saumur Castle - Vintage Picture By Maugli-l.
Engraved plate of Saint Florent Abbey of Saumur, in the book "Monasticon Gallicanum." 1600s. By Michel Germain, Achille Peigné-Delacourt.
View of the abbey of Saint-Florent de Saumur in 1699, by 17th-century artist Louis Boudan for the collection "Recueil de Gaigni."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy於0995年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾時，她的父親Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II33歲，母親Gerberge Du Perche65歲。她於1011年與Lord Gausbert de Maille II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1070年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a form of Gaynor adapted to Welsh orthography. It also may have been influenced by the name of the saint commemorated at Llangeinwyr in Glamorgan, known popularly as Llangeinor. Her name is derived from Welsh cain ‘beautiful’ + (g)wyry(f) ‘maiden’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy was born in 0995, in Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II, was 33 and her mother, Gerberge Du Perche, was 65. She married Lord Gausbert de Maille II in 1011. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1070, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy est née en 0995, à Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gerberge Du Perche, avait 65 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Gausbert de Maille II en 1011. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1070, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Sie hat 1011 Lord Gausbert de Maille II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1070 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy(이)가 0995년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 소머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gerberge Du Perche(은)는 65세였다. 그녀는 1011년 Lord Gausbert de Maille II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1070년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy nasceu em 0995, em Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge Du Perche, tinha 65 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Gausbert de Maille II em 1011. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1070, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy родилась в 0995 г. в местности саумур, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur Gilduin de Saumur II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gerberge Du Perche, 65. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Gausbert de Maille II в 1011 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1070 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

Se casó con Lord Gausbert de Maille II en 1011. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1070, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
